pokemon:karrablast.name: Karrablast
pokemon:karrablast.summary: For some reason they evolve when they receive electrical energy while they are attacking Shelmet.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: For some reason they evolve when they receive electrical energy while they are attacking Shelmet.
These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.
For some reason they evolve when they receive electrical energy while they are attacking Shelmet.
These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.
It spits a liquid from its mouth to melt through Shelmet’s shell. Karrablast doesn’t eat the shell— it eats only the contents.
Its strange physiology reacts to electrical energy in interesting ways. The presence of a Shelmet will cause this Pokémon to evolve.
When they feel threatened, they spit an acidic liquid to drive attackers away. This Pokémon targets Shelmet.
For some reason they evolve when they receive electrical energy while they are attacking Shelmet.
These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.
For some reason they evolve when they receive electrical energy while they are attacking Shelmet.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: For some reason they evolve when they receive electrical energy while they are attacking Shelmet.

pokemon:escavalier.name: Escavalier
pokemon:escavalier.summary: These Pokémon evolve by wearing the shell covering of a Shelmet. The steel armor protects their whole body.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: These Pokémon evolve by wearing the shell covering of a Shelmet. The steel armor protects their whole body.
They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.
Wearing the shell covering they stole from Shelmet, they defend themselves and attack with two lances.
Wearing the shell covering they stole from Shelmet, they defend themselves and attack with two lances.
It charges its enemies, lances at the ready. An image of one of its duels is captured in a famous painting of Escavalier clashing with Sirfetch’d.
They use shells they’ve stolen from Shelmet to arm and protect themselves. They’re very popular Pokémon in the Galar region.
These Pokémon evolve by wearing the shell covering of a Shelmet. The steel armor protects their whole body.
Wearing the shell covering they stole from Shelmet, they defend themselves and attack with two lances.
Wearing the shell covering they stole from Shelmet, they defend themselves and attack with two lances.
These Pokémon evolve by wearing the shell covering of a Shelmet. The steel armor protects their whole body.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: These Pokémon evolve by wearing the shell covering of a Shelmet. The steel armor protects their whole body.
